items.title: Alvin Kamara: Decision coming soon
items.body_text: Saints GM Mickey Loomis said Monday that the team will make a decision on Kamara's (knee) future with the team in "the next week or two," Mike Triplett of NewOrleans.Football reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Jacoby Brissett: Not present for voluntary OTAs
items.body_text: Brissett was not present for the start of voluntary OTAs on Monday, Ian Rapoport of NFL Network reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Chris Olave: Talking extension with New Orleans
items.body_text: Saints GM Mickey Loomis said Monday that talks with Olave (illness) regarding a contact extension have been positive, Katherine Terrell of ESPN.com reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Aaron Rodgers: Makes deal with Steelers official
items.body_text: Rodgers officially signed a one-year contract with the Steelers on Monday. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
